title: Harvest Quotes
subtitle: Browse external sources and import quotes into your database
search_placeholder: Search for an author or topic...
hint_search: On WikiQuote, each author or topic is a 'page' containing their quotes.
empty_results: No results found. Try a different search term.
hint_suggested: Or search above for a specific author or topic on {source}.
empty_initial: Type a name to search for authors or topics
select_prompt: Select a page from the left
select_prompt_desc: Choose an author or topic to preview their quotes
import_info: Import {n} quote(s)... (n will be skipped as duplicates)
toast_import_body: {imported} imported, {skipped} skipped, {authors} authors created, {references} references created
